templates.name: AI Addendum
templates.description: Common Paper standard addendum that sets terms for the use of AI features and customer data with an AI service.

templates.name: Business Associate Agreement (BAA)
templates.description: Common Paper standard HIPAA Business Associate Agreement between a covered entity and a business associate handling protected health information.

templates.name: Cloud Service Agreement (CSA)
templates.description: Common Paper standard agreement covering the provision and use of a cloud-hosted SaaS product.

templates.name: Data Processing Agreement (DPA)
templates.description: Common Paper Data Processing Agreement governing the processing of personal data by a service provider on behalf of a customer.

templates.name: Design Partner Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard agreement between a company and an early customer collaborating on the design of a new product or feature.

templates.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (Mutual NDA)
templates.description: Common Paper standard mutual NDA terms for the exchange of confidential information between two parties.

templates.name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
templates.description: Cover page for the Common Paper Mutual NDA, capturing the parties, effective date, and signature blocks that pair with the standard terms.

templates.name: Partnership Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard agreement governing a commercial partnership, including referral, reseller, and co-marketing arrangements.

templates.name: Pilot Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard agreement for a time-limited pilot or proof-of-concept of a product or service.

templates.name: Professional Services Agreement (PSA)
templates.description: Common Paper standard agreement for the provision of professional or consulting services, with statements of work attached.

templates.name: Service Level Agreement (SLA)
templates.description: Common Paper Service Level Agreement defining uptime commitments, service credits, and exclusions for a hosted service.

templates.name: Software License Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard agreement for licensing on-premise or downloadable software to a customer.
